# Baseline line-count ceiling for views that predate the size guardrail.
# These files may NOT grow past their listed line count.
# Files not listed here are capped at 500 lines (see view-size-check.yml).
# Shrink a file below its baseline -> lower the number here, don't leave slack.
# Remove an entry once the file is decomposed under 500 lines.
